description:
pyDREAM Poly LMA Hard-Sphere (deprecated)

This legacy template preserves the earlier mixed sphere/ellipsoid-equivalent-sphere behavior for backwards compatibility with older projects.

For new work, prefer one of the newer split templates:
- pyDREAM Poly LMA Hard-Sphere for the strict sphere-only hard-sphere workflow
- pyDREAM Poly LMA Hard-Sphere/Ellipsoid Mix (Approx.) for the mixed-shape approximate workflow

Like the mixed approximate template, ellipsoid rows are reduced to an equivalent-sphere interaction radius before the hard-sphere Percus-Yevick structure factor is evaluated.
